$comment: Delhi preset years. 2026 = baseline.json. 2000 canopyPct/populationM cited (FSI 2003 proxy; Census 2001). 2024 tempC/pm25/canopyPct cited (IMD Safdarjung climatology; CSE 2025; ISFR 2023). 1973 populationM cited (Delhi Economic Survey). Other values are engineering estimates anchored to cited trend data (DU 2025 built-up growth +70% 2000–22; Shahfahad 2024 vegetation loss 30% 1991–21). Flagged in UI.
